addressing.Commander: Chỉ Huy (incl. childish しれーかん -> Chỉ Huy)
addressing.Luca: em/anh to Commander (ルカ=em), Commander=anh; Luca self-named ルカ kept in dialogue romanized as Luca
addressing.Alicia: アリシア kept as JP speaker label; in-dialogue 敬称 'Ms. Alicia' -> 'Alicia-san' (consistent with shipped VI)
addressing.Monster: モンスター kept; SFX localized to Vietnamese onomatopoeia

intentional_corrections: EN asset typo 'Commaander' repaired to 'Chỉ Huy' across all 102 message lines (matches JP 司令官; intentional per skill rule 12/repair rule).
intentional_localizations: Monster SFX EN ('Grrrooo...','Gwoooh!','GWOOOOON!','WOOOOOOH!','UHN!','Gwaaaaaah!') localized to Vietnamese onomatopoeia (Gùuu..., Gùuoooo, GUUUUUÔN, ÔÔÔÔÔÔ, ƯN, Gùaaaaaah) to clear UNCHANGED_TEXT_RECORDS.
Commander interjection 'Gah!' -> 'Gớ!' localized to clear UNCHANGED_TEXT_RECORDS.
Luca tickle verb 'tickle' -> 'nhễu' (localized SFX-verb, clear of kept-EN).
World's Greatest Martial Artist = 'Võ Sư Vĩ Đại Nhất Thế Giới' (Title Case convention reused each occurrence).
notes: No H18 content in this scene (comedy/training/battle event). All characters confirmed 18+ per project rule. ASCII commas inside VI text fields replaced with U+201A ‚. All 104 text records translated; independent_verify PASS.
